name: Academic collaboration inquiry

## Lab + role

- Institution:
- PI:
- Your role:
- Lab focus:

## Proposed collaboration

What would you like to do with this repo? Pick one or more:
- [ ] Run a wet-lab validation campaign on top-ranked compounds
- [ ] Contribute a new in silico method (better QSAR, docking, generative)
- [ ] Joint grant application
- [ ] Data-sharing partnership (patient cohort, biomarker, etc.)
- [ ] Methodology critique / sensitivity analysis
- [ ] Other:

## What you can bring

(Cell lines, assay platforms, compute, funding, patient cohort, expertise…)

## What you'd need from us

(Curated compound list, ranking outputs, pre-registration support…)

## Constraints

- IRB / IBC status:
- MTA needs:
- Funding source (if relevant):
- Authorship norms:
- Embargo / open-publication expectations: (we cannot accept embargo
  arrangements beyond 90 days)

## Timeline

When would you want to start? What's your rough horizon?
